name: form-tanstack-checkbox

metadata.response:
Item Details:

## form-tanstack-checkbox
**Type:** registry:example
**Files:** 1 file(s)
**Dependencies:** @tanstack/react-form, zod

visual_summary: A form with a TanStack Checkbox component allows users to select one or multiple options from a list. This UI component is used when a user needs to agree to terms or select preferences. It is ideal for registration, purchase, or survey forms.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: form-tanstack-checkbox
Description: A form with a TanStack Checkbox component allows users to select one or multiple options from a list. This UI component is used when a user needs to agree to terms or select preferences. It is ideal for registration, purchase, or survey forms.
Style: e.g. default, filled, outline
Interactions: e.g. clickable, hoverable, responsive
Tags: form, checkbox, radio-group, survey, preferences

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
